## Plugin name

`claude-sessions-...`

## What it would do

One paragraph describing the new subcommand(s) and behavior.

## Who would use it

Be specific. "Anyone" is not an answer.

## Are you planning to build it?

- [ ] Yes, I'm building it
- [ ] Maybe, looking for collaborators
- [ ] No, just an idea

If you're building it, link the repo here once it exists and we'll add it to a community plugins list in the README.
